description: Add JetBrains IDE integrations to your Coder workspaces with configurable options.

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The resource ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: agent_name
variables.description: The name of a Coder agent. Needed for workspaces with multiple agents.

variables.name: channel
variables.description: JetBrains IDE release channel. Valid values are release and eap.

variables.name: download_base_link
variables.description: URL of the JetBrains download base link.

variables.name: folder
variables.description: The directory to open in the IDE. e.g. /home/coder/project

variables.name: major_version
variables.description: The major version of the IDE. i.e. 2025.1

variables.name: releases_base_link
variables.description: URL of the JetBrains releases base link.

variables.name: tooltip
variables.description: Markdown text that is displayed when hovering over workspace apps.
variables.default: You need to install [JetBrains Toolbox App](https://www.jetbrains.com/toolbox-app/) to use this button.
